name_meaning.title: What ACCINOR Stands For
name_meaning.acc: Accompaniment, Acceleration: we stand by your side, from the very first spark of an idea to the moment it changes the world
name_meaning.in: Innovation, Incubation: where raw ideas are shaped, nurtured, and launched into ventures that truly matter
name_meaning.or: Orientation, Originality: clear direction meets authentic vision — we help you build what only you can build
name_meaning.footer: Every letter tells a story. Every syllable is a promise.

cta.title: Time to Start
cta.subtitle: Don't wait any longer. Start your entrepreneurial journey today with ACCINOR

why.title: Why ACCINOR
why.subtitle: A partner built for the Oriental region's entrepreneurs — grounded in method, proximity, and genuine commitment.

local.title: Rooted in the Region
local.desc: We understand the Oriental region's economy, its institutions, and its opportunities — and we work where you are.

method.title: A Structured Method
method.desc: A clear, step-by-step approach that takes a raw idea to a fundable, launch-ready project.

expertise.title: Cross-Disciplinary Expertise
expertise.desc: Strategy, business planning, funding, and training under one roof, tailored to each project.

commitment.title: Committed to Your Success
commitment.desc: We measure our work by your progress — practical guidance, honest advice, real accompaniment.

methodology.title: How We Work
methodology.subtitle: A proven path from first idea to sustainable growth.

discover.title: Discover
discover.desc: We listen, assess your idea, and understand your ambition and constraints.

structure.title: Structure
structure.desc: We shape the model, plan, and strategy that make your project viable.

build.title: Build
build.desc: We prepare you to launch — business plan, funding readiness, and skills.

grow.title: Grow
grow.desc: We accompany you beyond launch, toward funding, scale, and lasting impact.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Building bridges to success for entrepreneurs in the Oriental region

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Helping individuals transition from an idea to a successful, fundable project through consulting, training, and continuous support.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: Towards a strong entrepreneurial ecosystem in the Oriental region that creates jobs and supports innovation.

region.title: Geographic Focus
region.body: We operate in the Oriental region of Morocco, targeting 8 cities in the first phase

services_page.title: Our Services
services_page.subtitle: Comprehensive support at every stage of your entrepreneurial journey

programs.title: Training Programs
programs.subtitle: Practical training to sharpen your entrepreneurial skills
programs.intro: Our programs turn knowledge into action. Each one is built around real projects, led by experienced coaches, and designed for entrepreneurs in the Oriental region — from first-time founders to growing businesses.

fundamentals.title: Entrepreneurship Fundamentals
fundamentals.desc: From idea to project: validate your concept, understand your market, and build the mindset of a successful entrepreneur.

business_model.title: Business Model & Plan
business_model.desc: Design a clear business model and a professional business plan that convinces partners and funders.

financial.title: Financial Literacy
financial.desc: Master budgeting, pricing, cash flow, and realistic financial projections for your project.

marketing.title: Marketing & Sales
marketing.desc: Attract and keep customers with practical marketing, branding, and sales techniques for small businesses.

pitch.title: Pitch & Fundraising
pitch.desc: Prepare a compelling pitch and the documents you need to approach banks, programs, and investors.

digital.title: Digital Skills
digital.desc: Use the digital tools that help you manage, promote, and grow your business online.

workshops.title: Group Workshops
workshops.desc: Interactive sessions with other entrepreneurs to learn by doing.

individual.title: Individual Coaching
individual.desc: One-on-one guidance focused on your specific project and goals.

cohort.title: Program Cohorts
cohort.desc: Structured multi-week journeys that take you from idea to launch.

cta.title: Ready to build your skills?
cta.desc: Book a free consultation and we'll help you choose the right program for your stage.

funding.title: Funding Support
funding.subtitle: We help you access the right funding for your project
funding.intro: Many great projects never get funded — not for lack of potential, but for lack of preparation. We help you become fundable and guide you to the opportunities that fit your project.

readiness.title: Funding Readiness
readiness.desc: We assess your project and tell you honestly what is needed to become fundable.

preparation.title: File Preparation
preparation.desc: Business plan, financial projections, and a complete funding file ready to submit.

guidance.title: Program Guidance
guidance.desc: We help you identify the grants, loans, and support programs that fit your project.

application.title: Application Support
application.desc: We guide you step by step through the application and required documents.

pitch.title: Pitch Preparation
pitch.desc: Practice and refine the pitch you will present to banks, programs, and investors.

followup.title: Post-Funding Follow-up
followup.desc: Continued support after funding to help you use it well and stay on track.

cta.title: Looking for funding?
cta.desc: Book a free consultation and we'll map your path to the right funding.
